'''Loronar Defense Industries''' was a subsidiary of the [[Loronar Corporation/Legends|Loronar Corporation]]. Its mandate was to produce [[blaster artillery]], [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolasers]], and [[Starship/Legends|starships]] such as the [[Strike-class medium cruiser|''Strike''-class medium cruiser]] and [[Torpedo Sphere/Legends|Torpedo Sphere]].<ref name="EGTD" />

{{Company-stub}}
